items.name: Pwny
items.description: This magical pwny lets you rise high above the rest on a spiked platform.  Left click at anytime on your magical flight to drop the spiky platform (and yourself) onto enemies.

items.name: Galactic Green Blaster
items.description: When they say eat your greens, they didn't mean lasers! Fire multi-colored laser beams of different shades of green at your enemies! Offers a medium range while also dealing roughly 20 damage per hit.

items.name: Cursed Mummy Friend
items.description: He's normal just like you and me. Except for that whole mummy curse thing. That's whack.

items.name: Board With a Nail in It
items.description: Did they? That board with a nail in it may have defeated us. But the humans won't stop there. They'll make bigger boards and bigger nails, and soon, they will make a board with a nail so big, it will destroy them all!

items.name: Dual Katanas of the DarkAge Clan
items.description: These ancient katanas have been passed down from generation to generation of DarkAge ninjas.  Only the most agile may learn to wield the dual katanas.

items.name: Evil Duck Roped
items.description: The most sinister roped yet!  Hit the 'H' key to make it quack!  Hit 'Q' to make it rain ducks.

items.name: Old Timey Hot Air Balloon
items.description: Up, up, and away! Equip and click to spawn the hot air balloon; hop in the seat and click around and hold your mouse button to guide the balloon around in the direction of your cursor. Flames ignite by the engine above as you're ascending

items.name: Dual Venomshanks
items.description: Great for lunging and slashing, but its real damage comes with its special ability.  Hit 'E', 'Q', 'Z', or 'X' to create acid rain that will fall on anyone in a 50 stud radius.

items.name: Intergalactic Sword
items.description: Do planetary amounts of damage with this intergalactic chainsword.

items.name: Staff of Neverending Frost
items.description: Freeze your enemies solid!

items.name: TheAmazeman's ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: TheAmazeman. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: Roblox Snowglobe 2011
items.description: Make it snow everywhere you go!

items.name: Rukiryo's ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: Rukiryo. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: Omega Rainbow Sword
items.description: The power of all future rainbows is at your finger tips. Click to slash, dealing 18 to 22 damage per hit. Double click to dash forward with the speed of a magical rainbow!

items.name: Remote Mine
items.description: Remote Mine activating in 5...4....3...2....BOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

items.name: Windforce
items.description: She's like the wind.

items.name: Super Freeze Ray 2011
items.description: The only thing strong enough to counter a freeze ray?  A steaming cup of hot chocolate!

items.name: Atomizer
items.description: Split yourself into pieces to evade your enemies!

items.name: Protest Sign: Blame John
items.description:
A typical conversation at ROBLOX HQ 
Brighteyes: "Where's my double hat feature?" Silence... "I blame John."

items.name: Bluesteel Katana
items.description: “Only by living at the edge of death can you understand the indescribable joy of life.”

items.name: Leland the Lolturtle
items.description: Leland does it for the lulz.

items.name: Dragon Slayers Sword and Shield
items.description: Protecting the people from dragons is its primary goal.  Whatever else you do with it is your own business.

items.name: Orbital Violin Strike
items.description: Play a violin that summons other flaming violins to smite your foes! The most ridiculous weapon on ROBLOX has arrived!  Any player you hit is dealt 15 damage per limb.

items.name: Earth Protection Orb
items.description: Heal the world!  In ROBLOX - world heals you!  Well...it at least protects you!  This Earth orbits around you and shields you from nearby foes. Anyone who dares approach you will feel the burning wrath of core magma!

items.name: Instant Campfire
items.description: Pull up a log and roast a hot dog!

items.name: Blue Rolling Hoverboard
items.description: Click to spawn your very own true blue  hoverboard! Control your direction using arrow keys or the 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' keys. Hit Backspace to dismount.

items.name: Bloxxy Radar
items.description: You can't run. You can't hide. You can only get bloxxed. This device displays the location of all players within 300 studs.

items.name: Beach Ball
items.description: Have a ball with this classic beach toy.

items.name: Pool Noodle
items.description: Swing your pool noodle with all you've got!  Anyone it hits will be pushed back.

items.name: Candy Cane Bow
items.description: Sweet, but deadly. Click and hold to charge, let go to release and fire an arrow in the direction of your cursor. Does between 15 minimum to 100 maximum damage depending on the charge.
